hooks.command: CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null) && case "$CMD" in *'rm -rf /'*|*'> /dev/sda'*|*'mkfs'*|*':(){:|:&};:'*) echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive command detected' >&2; exit 2 ;; *'chmod -R 777'*|*'chmod 777 /'*) echo 'BLOCKED: Recursive chmod 777 is dangerous' >&2; exit 2 ;; *'cat '*'.env'*|*'head '*'.env'*|*'tail '*'.env'*|*'less '*'.env'*|*'more '*'.env'*|*'cat '*'credentials'*|*'cat '*'secret'*) echo 'BLOCKED: Reading secrets files via shell is not allowed — use environment variables' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac || true

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null) && case "$FILE" in */.env|*/.env.local|*/.env.production|*/.env.staging|*/.env.development) echo 'BLOCKED: Reading .env files is not allowed — use environment variables directly. Read .env.example instead.' >&2; exit 2 ;; */credentials.json|*/secrets.json|*/service-account*.json|*/.gcloud/*|*/.aws/credentials|*/.ssh/id_*) echo 'BLOCKED: Reading credentials/secrets files is not allowed' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac || true

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ] && case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.json|*.css) command -v npx >/dev/null 2>&1 && npx --yes prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.py) command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1 && ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || command -v black >/dev/null 2>&1 && black -q "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.rs) command -v rustfmt >/dev/null 2>&1 && rustfmt "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.go) command -v gofmt >/dev/null 2>&1 && gofmt -w "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.c|*.h|*.cpp|*.hpp) command -v clang-format >/dev/null 2>&1 && clang-format -i "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac || true
